message:
🐛 Fix checkout error, cart clipping, and add-to-cart from collections

- Extract CartFields fragment for cart mutations to fix "Fragment
  ProductFields was used, but not defined" GraphQL error on checkout
- Add overflow-x-hidden and proper padding to cart drawer to prevent
  horizontal clipping
- Use useCart hook directly in ProductCard so Add button works from
  collections/homepage without needing onAddToCart prop

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
